name: jasmine-translator
description: A lightweight AI web page translator for Chrome and Edge.

scripts.build: esbuild src/content/index.js --bundle --format=iife --target=chrome114 --banner:js="// Generated by npm run build. Do not edit directly. Source entry: src/content/index.js" --legal-comments=none --outfile=src/content.js
scripts.watch: esbuild src/content/index.js --bundle --format=iife --target=chrome114 --banner:js="// Generated by npm run build. Do not edit directly. Source entry: src/content/index.js" --legal-comments=none --outfile=src/content.js --watch
